title: Search under way after Boeing 737 cargo plane vanishes off Pakistan coast
description: The plane, carrying five people, rapidly descended before losing contact, authorities say.
content:
Aviation officials in Pakistan say a search operation is ongoing after a cargo plane carrying five crew members went missing off the coast of Karachi, a city at the country's southern tip.

title: Hundreds of jobs at risk in John Lewis' gift wrapping and money exchange services
description: No final decision has been made but the job cuts will happen in the autumn if the redundancy plans are approved.
content:
Around 200 John Lewis staff could lose their jobs as the retailer looks to close its in-store money exchange services and dedicated gift wrapping areas.
No final decision has been made but the job cuts will happen in the autumn if the redundancy plan... [2034 chars]

title: Victims of 23andMe data breach to get $47m payout, judge rules
description: 23andMe compiles genetic profiles of people through DNA testing kits, but it was heavily criticised after a 2023 hack.
content:
Victims of a 2023 data hack at genetics testing company 23andMe are set to receive a multi-million payout from the firm.
A California bankruptcy court judge ruled on Tuesday that Chrome Holding, which last year took control of 23andMe after its bankr... [2287 chars]

title: Typhoon Maysak triggers floods, thunderstorms and rare tornadoes in China
description: Villagers whose families have been stranded told the BBC they are struggling to get food and help.
content:
On Sunday, heavy rain began falling on Renhe village in the southern Chinese province of Guangxi.
The villagers were used to it. But the rain didn't stop - and the water suddenly rose.
By the early hours of Monday, the water had reached their knees. ... [4018 chars]

title: Questions swirl over top US Republican McConnell's hospital stay - here's what we know
description: McConnell, 84, has been in hospital for more than four weeks, and his staff have not yet said why he was admitted.
content:
Concerns are growing about the health of US Senator Mitch McConnell, a top Republican lawmaker who has been in hospital for over three weeks.
